statement: In every magma, Equation 3757 (`x * y = (y * x) * (z * w)`) implies Equation 3667 (`x * x = (x * y) * (y * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0755
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y x) (op z w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op x y) (op y x))
